title: For U.S., Unmet Expectations in Iran Fit a Familiar Pattern in the Region
summary_full: Iran’s military retaliation, along with the political defiance of its new leaders, evokes a decades-old pattern of unrealized goals for American interventions in the region.
summary_public: Iran’s military retaliation, along with the political defiance of its new leaders, evokes a decades-old pattern of unrealized goals for American interventions in the region.

IR.label: neutral
